---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement idea
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: type:enhancement, status:triage
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Type
- [ ] New Card Generator (e.g., new stats card variant)
- [ ] New Theme
- [ ] AI/Roasting Feature
- [ ] API Enhancement
- [ ] UI/UX Improvement
- [ ] Integration (external service)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: _____

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or use case this feature would solve. Who would benefit and why?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the ideal solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Example / Mockup
If applicable, provide mockups, sketches, or examples:
- Screenshot comparison
- Design mockup
- Example SVG output
- API request/response example

```
Insert example here
```

## Alternative Solutions
Describe alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context
- Impact: (e.g., improves user engagement, enables new integrations)
- Affected Components: (e.g., generators, themes, AI service)
- Estimated Effort: (e.g., low, medium, high)
- Dependencies: (e.g., requires GitHub API v4 changes, needs new theme system updates)

## Related Issues
Link any related issues or discussions: Closes #, Related to #
